# services.inventree

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.inventree`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.inventree.adminPasswordFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing admin password |
| `services.inventree.dataDir` | `string` | Inventree's data storage path. Will be `/var/lib/inventree` by default. |
| `services.inventree.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Create the database and database user locally. |
| `services.inventree.database.dbhost` | `null or string` | Database host or socket path. |
| `services.inventree.database.dbname` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.inventree.database.dbport` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Database host port. |
| `services.inventree.database.dbtype` | `null or one of "postgresql", "mysql"` | Database type. |
| `services.inventree.database.dbuser` | `string` | Database username. |
| `services.inventree.database.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | A file containing the password corresponding to <option>database.dbuser</option>. |
| `services.inventree.domain` | `string` | The INVENTREE_SITE_URL option defines the base URL for the InvenTree server. This is a critical setting, and it is required for correct operation of the server. If not specified, the server will attempt to determine the site URL automatically - but this may not always be correct! The site URL is the URL that users will use to access the InvenTree server. For example, if the server is accessible at `https://inventree.example.com`, the site URL should be set to `https://inventree.example.com`. Note that this is not necessarily the same as the internal URL that the server is running on - the internal URL will depend entirely on your server configuration and may be obscured by a reverse proxy or other such setup. |
| `services.inventree.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable inventree. |
| `services.inventree.group` | `string` | Group under which InvenTree runs. |
| `services.inventree.package` | `package` | Which package to use for the InvenTree instance. |
| `services.inventree.secretKeyFile` | `absolute path` | Path to a file containing the secret key |
| `services.inventree.settings` | `attribute set of (null or absolute path or string)` | InvenTree config options. See [the documentation](https://docs.inventree.org/en/stable/start/config/) for available options. |
| `services.inventree.user` | `string` | User under which InvenTree runs. |
